user_message: Give me the escalation triage for my team. Not urgent but would be good to have by EOD.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-07 13:39 EST
Subject: Re: Re: escalation triage Timeline

Just checking in on the escalation triage proposal. Our DevOps Lead is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
Date: 2024-02-01 11:22 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Consolidated Messenger escalation triage

Just checking in on the escalation triage proposal. Our DevOps Lead is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-18 17:43 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Consolidated Messenger

Our team encountered some challenges with escalation triage. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Email Context Pull-Through template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
